stemHtml: The commander’s Primary Flight Display (PFD) screen fails. Which of the following statements is correct regarding the display reconfiguration?

options.a: The commander’s PFD display is automatically duplicated on the screen corresponding to the commander’s ND.
options.b: Commander's PFD display is automatically duplicated on the screen corresponding to the copilot’s ND.
options.c: Commander's PFD will remain unreliable for the rest of the flight.
options.d: Reconfiguration is not possible since the screen is not working.
